title: T-134 — WIRING: NPD Dashboard page assembly NPD-e slice of T-052
prompt:
# T-134 — NPD Dashboard page wiring

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §11.1, §11.5, §11.7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:32-174 (NpdDashboard)
Parent root: T-052

## Goal
Assemble dashboard regions (T-132 KPI counters + T-133 Pipeline preview) into the /(npd) page (RSC) with data wiring (getDashboardSummary + recent projects query) and navigation links to /(npd)/pipeline and FA detail routes.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/page.tsx (RSC) calls getDashboardSummary + getRecentNpdProjects in parallel; passes data to a Client wrapper.
2. The Client wrapper renders DashboardCounters (from T-132) above DashboardPipelinePreview (from T-133); both consume the RSC-provided data via props.
3. Navigation links in the preview region route to /(npd)/fa/[productCode] and /(npd)/pipeline correctly.
4. RTL integration test verifies all regions mount and data flows from the page.tsx to the regions.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/page.tsx [modify]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/dashboard-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/__tests__/dashboard-client.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the /(npd) page renders, when both regions mount, then DashboardCounters + DashboardPipelinePreview appear in the documented layout order with data provided from the RSC page — verified by RTL integration test
2. Given getDashboardSummary returns a summary, when the page renders, then summary values appear in DashboardCounters tiles — verified by RTL with mocked RSC data
3. Given a user clicks the view-all pipeline link or a project row, when navigation triggers, then it routes to /(npd)/pipeline or /(npd)/fa/[productCode] respectively — verified by RTL link assertion

## Test strategy
- RED: dashboard-client.test.tsx asserting regions render, data flows from page, links route correctly before wiring exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test dashboard-client'

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate region components here (use T-132 and T-133 outputs)
- Do not call getDashboardSummary from a Client Component (RSC fetches it)
- Do not break navigation contracts to FA detail or pipeline routes
